title: Please share your most useful automations for sales functions.

posts.author: Chuck.johnson (Chuck Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: I am new to Monday and can see the potential power in using automations to organize my sales leads and keep me on top of who needs attention and who i havent seen in a whlie. I am certain that there are tbose that have had that spark of ingenuity that resulted in a must have automation. Does anybody care to share their secrets?
